title: Huligina Maradi Temple
tagline: Huligina Maradi Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Huligina Maradi is a hill located in the Gundlupete Taluk, Chamarajanagar district of the state of Karnataka.
overview.description: Huligina Maradi is a hill located in the Gundlupete Taluk, Chamarajanagar district of the state of Karnataka. It has a temple dedicated to Lord Srinivasa. It is also known as Huligadri, Dakshina Seshadri and Vyagrachala. This place is popularly known as "Dakshina Sheshadri", as narrated in ‘Srimad Varaha Purana’.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Huligina Maradi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Huligina Maradi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Huligina Maradi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Huligina Maradi Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Huligina Maradi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Huligina Maradi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Huligina Maradi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Huligina Maradi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kaggalada Hundi, Achattipura.
